form.formComment: Third-up today. Comes off a 38 day let-up. Resuming ran last of 14 at this track on February 4 over 1500m, 15 len behind Force Gate with 56kg at $261.90. Second-up 10th of 12 at this track on March 3 over 1600m, 11 len behind On Glide Path carrying 56kg at $252. Win would surprise.

form.formComment: Returns from a 39-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 12 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Kaseno Rao carrying 56kg at $5.70. The run before that raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 13 at this track on February 2 over 1400m, 9 len behind Miss Margaux with 56kg at $14.70. Draws a nice alley and rates highly.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 12 at Urawa on March 17 over 1500m, 9 len behind Fukuchan King carrying 54kg at $11.90. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 11 at this track on March 5 over 1500m, 4.5 len behind Captain Blue with 54kg at $8.40. Leading contender coming out of a very nice alley.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after four months second last of 12 at this track on March 3 over 1600m, 16 len behind On Glide Path with 53kg at $292.20.
